generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a father and a taxpayer, I support giving our security agencies the tools they need to keep us safe. The recent attacks show we can't afford to tie their hands with outdated rules. Common sense tells us we should trust our neighbors and our law enforcement to do what's right. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
